results.title: Mayor’s Diary: June 7 to June 21
results.description: The diary for the Mayor of Guildford, Jane Tyson, and Deputy Mayor, Dominique Williams. All information as supplied by GBC. Find out about Guildford’s Mayor & Deputy Mayor here. Friday 5 June to Sunday 21 June 2026 Monday 8 June 18:00 The Mayor attends His Majesty’s Lord-Lieutenant & Mrs Sarah Molyneux’s Drinks Reception at the Tithe [...] The post Mayor’s Diary: June 7 to June 21 appeared first on Guildford Dragon .
